Description: Refactor frontend structure and settings workflow while preserving behavior.

Description: Advance camera and Face ID integration and merge-readiness with integration UI stream.

Description: Maintain required sprint artifacts with backlog and sprint markers.

Title: Reminder creation
Description: As a user, I want the assistant to create reminders for me, so that I do not forget important tasks.

Title: Timers and alarms
Description: As a user, I want the assistant to set timers and alarms, so that I can manage my time effectively.

Title: App control permissions
Description: As a user, I want to choose which applications the assistant is allowed to control, so that I feel safe about what it can access.

Title: Toggle screen viewing
Description: As a user, I want to enable or disable the assistant’s screen viewing at any time, so that I remain in control of my privacy.

Title: Preference learning
Description: As a user, I want the assistant to learn my preferences over time, so that it becomes more personalized and helpful.
